import { Container, Grid } from '@material-ui/core' import React, { useState } from 'react' import ClassroomCards from '../components/ClassroomCards' export default function TeacherDashboard() { const [classrooms, setClassrooms] = useState([ { title: 'Web Development', body: 'MWF (7:00AM-10:00AM)', section: 'BSCpE-3A', imagebg: webdev, id: 1 }, { title: 'Web Design', body: 'TTh (1:00PM-5:00PM)', section: 'BSCpE-3B', imagebg: webdes, id: 2 }, { title: 'JavaScript Programming', body: 'MWF (7:00AM-10:00AM)', section: 'BSCpE-3A', imagebg: js, id: 3 }, { title: 'Calculus', body: 'TTh (1:00PM-5:00PM)', section: 'BSCE-3A', imagebg: mathbg, id: 4 }, { title: 'Arduino', body: 'MWF (7:00AM-10:00AM)', section: 'BSCE-3A', imagebg: arduino, id: 5 }, { title: 'Numerical Methods', body: 'TTh (1:00PM-5:00PM)', section: 'BSCE-3A', imagebg: mathbg, id: 6 }, { title: 'Engineering Basics', body: 'MWF (7:00AM-10:00AM)', section: 'BSCpE-3A', imagebg: engr, id: 7 }, { title: 'Graphic Designing', body: 'TTh (1:00PM-5:00PM)', section: 'BSCpE-3B', imagebg: graphicdesign, id: 8 }, { title: 'Python Programming', body: 'MWF (7:00AM-10:00AM)', section: 'BSCpE-3A', imagebg: py, id: 9 }, { title: 'Art App', body: 'TTh (1:00PM-5:00PM)', section: 'BSCpE-3B', imagebg: arts, id: 10 }, ]) return (
{classrooms.map(subject => ( ))}
) }
